hero.description: Prompt guide for creating AI Nike Chan images and videos

intro.heading: Introduction
intro.description:
AI Nike Chan is a character with relatively flexible guidelines. This page introduces reusable prompt ideas and examples for creating images and videos of Nike Chan with AI.
Generative AI services change quickly, so this guide does not cover account registration or detailed UI steps for any single service.
intro.pointDescription: The important part is not which tool you use, but how you describe reference images, character traits, and scenes. The same approach works for original characters too.

recommendedAI.heading: Image Generation Service Examples
recommendedAI.description:
For image generation, you can use services and models such as the examples below.
Available features, pricing, and usage conditions can change, so choose whatever is practical at the time.

materials.heading: Prepare Reference Materials
materials.description: You can create images with text alone, but reference images help keep the character design stable. Download the following AI Nike Chan image and use it as a reference image.

model3D.downloadLabel: Download AI Nike Chan 3D Model Image

usageMaterialsWarning.heading: About Usable Materials:
usageMaterialsWarning.description: When creating AI Nike Chan works using AI, there are materials you can use and materials you cannot. The above image is fine to use. For details, please see the Guidelines page.

prompts.heading: How to Write Image Prompts
prompts.description1:
For image generation, results tend to become more stable when you separate what to draw, what the situation is, and which character traits must remain visible.
For AI Nike Chan, small details like the hairpin and chest text can break easily, so it helps to describe them in text even when you provide a reference image.
prompts.structure: For image prompts, it is useful to write in this order: 1. use the character from the reference image, 2. pose and expression, 3. background and composition, and 4. traits that must stay intact.

tips.heading: Prompt Tips:
tips.description1:
Even when you pass reference images, fine details may not be reflected well.
For AI Nike Chan, the hairpin shape and chest text often break down.
tips.description2: That's why it is important to explicitly specify fine details as character traits. I usually include the feature list below almost as-is every time.

gachaWarning.heading: About Generative AI Randomness:
gachaWarning.description:
Generative AI has a strong element of randomness, and even the same prompt can produce different results each time.
Even with a good prompt, you may not get the expected output. Keep trying while adjusting the wording little by little.

prompts.dancePrompt:
An illustration using the girl depicted in this three-view drawing.
She is saying "Let's do our best this week too!!"
She has a bright expression, with an upper-body composition.
The background is simple and suitable for posting on social media.

recommendedAI.heading: Video Generation Service Examples
recommendedAI.description:
Video generation is also a fast-changing area. Instead of registration steps, this guide focuses on prompt ideas that can be reused across services.
For video generation, examples include the services and models below.

materials.heading: Prepare Reference Materials
materials.description: Reference images are important for video generation too. Prepare the AI Nike Chan three-view image first so the tool can understand the character design. It also helps when creating a starting frame.

model3D.downloadLabel: Download AI Nike Chan 3D Model Image

usageMaterialsWarning.heading: About Usable Materials:
usageMaterialsWarning.description: When creating AI Nike Chan works using AI, there are materials you can use and materials you cannot. The above image is fine to use. For details, please see the Guidelines page.

prompts.heading: How to Write Video Prompts
prompts.description: For videos, describing the flow of time matters more than it does for a single image. In addition to character traits, specify movement, camera work, cuts, and whether there should be dialogue or audio.
prompts.structure:
For video prompts, it is useful to include these elements:
1. What the scene is
2. What the character does
3. Camera or cut movement
4. Whether there is dialogue or audio
5. Visual traits to preserve

story.heading: Prompt Starting from a Scene
story.description: Even when creating a video from a reference image, describe the scene, movement, and cut timing concretely. Including character traits helps reduce visual drift.
story.videoPrompt:
The girl in the image is dressed as a wizard and riding on a broom.
She is in a magic battle with an evil wizard whose face cannot be seen in the darkness.
No dialogue, focused on combat.
Dynamic action scene.
Cuts switch every 0.5 seconds.
A fantastic field with a Halloween atmosphere.

reference.heading: Prompt Starting from a Frame
reference.description: For services that support image references, it is helpful to prepare a natural pose as the starting frame. Rather than passing the three-view drawing directly, it is usually more stable to create the image composition you want for the first frame and then animate it.

aspectRatioWarning.heading: About Material Aspect Ratio:
aspectRatioWarning.description:
When creating a video from a reference image, prepare an image with an aspect ratio close to the target video.
Use around 16:9 for horizontal videos and around 9:16 for vertical videos to reduce unintended cropping.

tips.heading: Video Prompt Tips:
tips.description1:
Videos introduce movement, so small visual details can break more easily.
For AI Nike Chan, the hairpin shape and chest text are especially likely to drift.
tips.description2: In addition to character traits, constraints like "no dialogue," "fixed camera," or "upper-body composition" can help suppress unnecessary changes.

gachaWarning.heading: About Generative AI Randomness:
gachaWarning.description:
Video generation tends to vary even more than image generation.
Rather than aiming for a finished result in one try, it is more realistic to keep the movements that worked and adjust the prompt gradually.

reference.videoPrompt2:
The girl in the illustration is passionately singing a Japanese anime song in a karaoke box.
Cuts switch every 0.5 seconds.
Natural animation.
Her expression is cheerful, and the mouth movement while singing is visible.
The camera focuses on the upper body.

cta.heading: Enjoy Creating AI Nike Chan Fan Works!
cta.description:
Please share your creations on social media.
If you post with the hashtag "#AIニケちゃん", the administrator will definitely check it out!
